Details: Granular activated carbon can achieve high to very high removals of TCE (from 75% up to greater than 99% removal). One study monitored full-scale treatment of a ground water for four months without detectable breakthrough.  Another study reported short times to breakthrough but utilized a very high influent TCE concentration (1,000 ug/L). USEPA has identified granular activated carbon as a Best Available Technology for removal of TCE from drinking water.
